text: # You don't have access to the portal yet
You're logged in but don't have permission to use the portal. You can request access to Exploration, Mesh data, Data connections, Analysis, Data library, and Profile.

Workspace is not included in this request.  
 If you believe this is an error, contact your  
 platform administrator at [mc2dp@occ-data.org](mailto:mc2dp@occ-data.org).
